additionalDescription:
## Package Additional Details 
* This package is designed to install globally for the machine, it does so by setting the PaketExePath environment variable. This will make the project level paket executables irrelevant.
title: Paket
verificationHeader:
VERIFICATION
Verification is intended to assist the Chocolatey moderators and community
in verifying that this package's contents are trustworthy.

The embedded software have been downloaded from the listed download
location on <https://github.com/fsprojects/Paket/releases>
and can be verified by doing the following:

1. Packaged assets are downloaded from the github release url above, for the
  specific release which matches the package version.
2. Install/Uninstall scripts add/remove a machine level environment parameter
  using chocolatey `Install-ChocolateyEnvironmentVariable` method.

The file 'LICENSE.txt' has been obtained from <https://raw.githubusercontent.com/fsprojects/Paket/master/LICENSE.txt>

additionalDescription:
## Package Additional Details 
* This package embeds the MSI installer downloaded from the official GitHub release.
title: Cloudbase-Init (Install)
verificationHeader:
VERIFICATION
Verification is intended to assist the Chocolatey moderators and community
in verifying that this package's contents are trustworthy.

The embedded software have been downloaded from the listed download
location on <https://github.com/cloudbase/cloudbase-init/releases>
and can be verified by doing the following:

1. Packaged assets are downloaded from the github release url above, for the
  specific release which matches the package version.
2. Install/Uninstall scripts install/uninstall the MSI silently using
  chocolatey `Install-ChocolateyInstallPackage` / `Uninstall-ChocolateyPackage` methods.
